summary: Week 1 baseline locks. Only one weekly snapshot exists (2026-04-23, window 2026-04-16→2026-04-22); HYPOTHESES.md was already populated from this exact snapshot, so no new data has arrived since last update — no hypothesis clears the 3-consecutive-week gate, and most email-side hypotheses (H2/H4/H8) remain blocked pending RESEND_API_KEY. Traffic is healthy at 436 sessions with AI-search (chatgpt+copilot+cn.bing) holding 29.1% share and top-5 pages holding 38.6% share — both directionally alive at 0.3 confidence, week 1 of replication counter. Signups 13/week with 0 unsubs (n=13, below 30-event gate on H5). No guides at ≥50 sessions yet (best: 39, how-much-does-tiktok-pay-per-view). Prime mode: zero proposals fire this cycle — replication needs another 2 weekly snapshots minimum on H5/H7/H9.

meta_signals.baseline_drift_notes: Week 1 baseline is locked against 2026-04-23 snapshot (436 sessions, 13 signups, 443 pageviews). All future delta comparisons anchor here until 2026-07-16 (12 weeks). AI referral share (29.1%) is the single most interesting meta-signal — if it holds at Week 4 and sample size grows, promote to formal hypothesis. Channel entropy remains 1.0 (SEO-only input); at week 12 of sustained 1.0, flag over-optimization risk per rule. No weekly snapshot exists prior to 2026-04-23, so replication counters on H5/H7/H9 genuinely start at week 1 — next real increment happens when 2026-04-30 snapshot lands.
